title: A Maze of Death
author: Philip K. Dick
card_summary: A 1970 novel in which colonists arrive on the mysterious planet Delmak-O, where they begin dying under strange circumstances. The novel layers multiple realities and features Dick's invented theology with entities called the Mentufacturer, the Intercessor, and the Walker-on-Earth. 104 pages.
